arts.ttl: Ligue 1 Predictions | Round 19: Nice face Marseille and Strasbourg host Lille
arts.sum: Ligue 1 Predictions, Round 19 GFFN editor-in-chief Luke Entwistle and GFFN’s Raphaël Jucobin face off in our Ligue 1 predictions competition. It’s three points for a correct score, two points for a correct score difference, and one…

arts.ttl: Official | Nottingham Forest’s Andrew Omobamidele completes Strasbourg switch
arts.sum: RC Strasbourg Alsace have confirmed the arrival of Andrew Omobamidele (22). The Irishman joins from Nottingham Forest on a loan deal that the French club have the option to make…

arts.ttl: Man Utd’s ominous transfer messages from Jonathan David as ‘dream’ next club picked
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly pursuing Lille's Jonathan David but the in-demand striker's comments suggest that a transfer will be unlikely for several reasons
